purpose: IF-6 named-set coverage cluster — the SHIPPED §24 name-keyed set-difference applied to TS `enum`, Zod `z.enum`, and Python `frozenset` forms (the workshop-endorsed deterministic extension; keeps §24's behavioral-entailment property). Three divergences FIRE; three same-value clones must NOT (the polarity-opposite-of-a-clone-detector guard, per form). §28 keys on `canon`; `file:line` grounds each finding (R1) and lets §14 normalize.

expected_issues.claim: possible divergent named allowed-value set Priority (TS enum): billing defines Med, payments does not — a value one component admits the other's copy rejects; review
possible divergent named allowed-value set Channel (z.enum): worker admits 'push', api does not; review
possible divergent named allowed-value set ROLES (frozenset): svc_b admits 'guest', svc_a does not; review

must_not_fire.reason: same-value clone (TS enum): Mode is {On, Off} identically in payments and billing — agreed duplication, the jscpd-opposite guard; require a non-empty symmetric difference, never fire on agreement.
same-value clone (z.enum): LogLevel is ['debug','info'] identically in api and worker — identical membership → suppressed.
same-value clone (frozenset): PERMS is {'r','w'} identically in svc_a and svc_b — identical membership → suppressed.
